name: @mydownloader/desktop
description: Free video & audio downloader for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and 1000+ sites
author: Chris Phua

scripts.download-binaries: mkdir -p binaries && curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp_macos -o /tmp/yt-dlp-fat && lipo /tmp/yt-dlp-fat -thin arm64 -output binaries/yt-dlp && chmod +x binaries/yt-dlp && curl -L https://github.com/eugeneware/ffmpeg-static/releases/download/b6.1.1/ffmpeg-darwin-arm64 -o binaries/ffmpeg && chmod +x binaries/ffmpeg
